## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No raw CSS added — TailwindCSS only
- [ ] Components stay under 500 lines
- [ ] Errors are caught and shown visually (toast/banner) where applicable
- [ ] Design is responsive (mobile + desktop)
